Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-17-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeff Strobel for administrator Ryan Donnelly (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Strobel reported that the estate had paid three creditor claims and that the allowance was filed with the Court on the preceding Monday. He stated he was meeting with the Administrator the following week to prepare the petition for final distribution.

The Court continued the matter to February 25, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
